title: Rolling Admissions Time Table???
body: I applied RA to a local school in New York(St. Bonnies) a couple weeks ago and I got my response like 3 days later. A couple other big colleges I applied to RA around the same time and I have still yet to hear anything. Like it's been almost a month and I haven't gotten an email or text or anything. I was wondering how long it takes for bigger schools to get back to Rolling Admissions apps, the ones I'm talking about are Michigan State, Clemson, Coastal Carolina.
author: bostonatlanta

top_comments.text: Each school has its own time frame - the smaller ones are usually very quick while the bigger ones may take a few weeks. It may also depend on the major or college you've applied to.
top_comments.author: prsehgal

top_comments.text:
Three days is exceptionally quick. I wouldn’t expect that from anywhere.

If you’re a fairly clear admit - metrics above their 50-75% range, good recs/ECs, etc., I would expect anywhere from 2-5 weeks.

If you’re a borderline admission, it could be held until late in the application process.
top_comments.author: RichInPitt

title: St. Bonaventure University - Five Things I Wish I Knew Before Attending
body: I graduated in 1992.  I should have departed after the first week.  I have nothing but negative memories of my time there.  I wish I’d never heard of it.
author: @moneybagzz

title: St. Bonaventure - Marian Fathers' Saints in Focus
body: St. Bonaventure, thank you for your faith, and for all your accomplishments. Increase my faith, and trust in the Sacred Heart  of Jesus.
author: @ruthortega5822

title: St. Bonaventure - Marian Fathers' Saints in Focus
body: St. Bonaventure pray for us. Thank you Fr Anthony, Praying for you and Fr Chris. God bless you and everyone: For all stars of the DM group: Tanya C, Holly C, Florian Cenzon, Karyn Ann, Paula Ann, Deb Kas,

title: St. Bonaventure - Marian Fathers' Saints in Focus
body: My late father's name is BuenaVentura.  People always mistake the name for a woman.  Thank you for dessiminating this information.  God Bless!  St. Bonaventure, pray for us.
author: @edmelenepascua7542

title: St. Bonaventure - Marian Fathers' Saints in Focus
body: Please everyone please pray that the effect of Grace of the flame of love of our immaculate heart ❤of Mary be spread all over humanity so it may blind Satan 🙏💕🙏
